hero.name: Shekhar Dutt
hero.tagline: Co-Founder & Faculty (Sociology & Economy) | Sleepy Classes IAS
hero.quote: Engineering taught me how a society is built. Sociology is teaching me how a society is formed.

about.para1: Shekhar Dutt is Co-Founder of Sleepy Classes IAS — one of India's leading online UPSC coaching platforms. With a BE (Mechanical Engineering) from PEC Chandigarh and MBA (Finance) from Panjab University, he is a self-taught Sociology expert with 16+ years of teaching experience.
about.para2: He teaches Sociology Optional and GS Economy, and has guided students to AIR 2, AIR 5, AIR 13 and multiple single-digit UPSC ranks.

books.title: Sociology: Themes and Perspectives
books.desc: A must-read foundational text for understanding sociological theories.

books.title: Indian Society — Nadeem Hasnain
books.desc: Essential for Paper II — covers caste, tribe, kinship, and social change.

books.title: Social Change in Modern India — M.N. Srinivas
books.desc: Classic text on Sanskritization, dominant caste, and social mobility.

books.title: Sociological Theory — George Ritzer
books.desc: Comprehensive coverage of classical and contemporary sociological theories.

ebooks.title: Sociology Optional Notes — Shekhar Dutt
ebooks.desc: Comprehensive notes covering Paper I & II with answer writing frameworks.

ebooks.title: GS Economy Quick Revision Guide
ebooks.desc: Concise revision notes for GS Economy with diagrams and flowcharts.

sectionHeadings.achievementsSub: A decade and a half of results, trust, and relentless teaching — every number represents a life changed.
sectionHeadings.booksSub: Handpicked reads that will form the backbone of your Sociology Optional preparation.
sectionHeadings.ebooksSub: Curated notes and study material developed from 16+ years of UPSC teaching experience.
sectionHeadings.mediaSub: Featured coverage, interviews, and mentions across publications.
sectionHeadings.youtubeSub: Free comprehensive lectures on Sociology Optional, GS Economy, and UPSC Strategy.
sectionHeadings.twitterSub: Daily insights, UPSC tips, and motivation from Shekhar's Twitter/X feed.
sectionHeadings.consultSub: Get personalised UPSC strategy, Sociology optional guidance, and answer writing feedback directly from Shekhar Sir.
